LightningComponentBundle.description: Visualize upstream/downstream account relations generated from CM prompt-template JSON.

property.name: maxNodes
property.label: Max Nodes
property.description: Maximum nodes to return before graph truncation.

property.name: displayMode
property.label: Display Mode
property.description: network keeps compact relationship layout; story uses annotated lane presentation.

property.name: autoPromptEnabled
property.label: Enable Auto Prompt by Default (Deprecated)
property.description: Deprecated. This option is ignored; graph now prioritizes existing relationship records.
